mission.title: cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-: Allow overriding output directory for imports in cdk8s.yaml config file
mission.description: Allow overriding output directory for imports in cdk8s.yaml config file. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- deployment
steps.description:
Verify your cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-
helm list -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- installation.

steps.title: Review cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-
kubectl get configmap -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-
```
### Description of the feature or enhancement:

I think it would be useful to surface more of the configuration for the import command into the cdk8s.yaml file.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Allow overriding output directory for imports in cdk8s.yaml…
Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-
kubectl get events -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Allow overriding output directory for imports in cdk8s.yaml…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I looked into this more and there is a complication.
codeSnippets:
app: node index.js
language: typescript
output: dist
import_output: imports
imports:
  - k8s@1.17.0

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- installed or the issue environment reproducible.
